name: The Rest Is Up to You
translation-context:
Title: あとはご自由にどうぞ。～神様が本気出してラスボス倒したので私はただスローライフする～. Translate as: The Rest Is Up to You: Since God Got Serious and Defeated the Last Boss, I'll Just Live a Slow Life. Existing short title: God Wrecked the Last Boss.

Premise: God calls the situation a tutorial, beats the last boss almost completely, lets the protagonist deliver only the finishing blow, then says the rest is up to her. As a reward, the protagonist receives talent for learning skills, basic knowledge, and the same overpowered space magic God used during the tutorial. The protagonist has somehow become a girl and decides to enjoy an isekai slow life, often as an overpowered merchant/adventurer.

Name guidance: カリーナ = Karina. ソラシドーレ = Solasidore. ヴェーラルド = Verald. カルカッサ = Calcassa or Kalkassa; keep one spelling consistent. サティ = Sati. ゴメス = Gomez.

Tone/style: comedic isekai slow life with gender-bending/TS elements, cheat space magic, merchant/adventurer antics, and casual self-aware narration. Keep the protagonist's energetic, joking inner voice. Translate 空間魔法 as space magic, ラスボス as last boss/final boss depending on tone, 神様 as God, 魔道具 as magic tool or magical device, and スローライフ as slow life.
